entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Land, water, and vegetation that provide food, feed, fiber, and fuel for human survival

entities.name: LAND
entities.description: A natural resource providing essential needs for human beings

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A finite natural resource and elixir of life, essential for agriculture and survival

entities.name: VEGETATION
entities.description: A natural resource providing essential needs for human beings

entities.name: HUMAN BEINGS
entities.description: The species whose survival and well-being depend on the sustainable management of natural resources

entities.name: BIOTIC PRESSURE
entities.description: Growing pressure from living organisms leading to resource degradation

entities.name: OVEREXPLOITATION
entities.description: The excessive use of natural resources leading to degradation and scarcity

entities.name: DEGRADATION
entities.description: The accelerated decline of natural resources resulting in reduced productivity

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output capacity of natural resources, which is reduced by degradation

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The key approach for the sustenance and well-being of human beings through resource care

entities.name: DEMOGRAPHIC PRESSURE
entities.description: The increasing population demand that drives the overexploitation of water

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A major global consumer of water used for food production

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of generating food, primarily through agricultural water use

entities.name: WATERSHED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The concept, principles, and approaches applied to manage rainfed areas

entities.name: RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Geographic areas dependent on rainfall, targeted for watershed development
